title: Sewing Pattern 3639 PDF
short_description: Flared tunic with three-quarter length sleeves, open frill cuffs, and optional drawstring at hem. Suggested for jersey, chiffon or muslin fabrics.
pattern_info: Digital PDF sewing pattern. Multi-sized (sizes 42 to 54 included in one file). Net pattern (no seam allowances or hems). Does not include step-by-step sewing instructions. Includes all necessary instructions, notches and letters to compose the pattern. Available in five languages.

Flared tunic with ¾-length sleeves, open frill cuffs, and optional drawstring at hem. Suggested fabric: jersey, chiffon or muslin.

Reference 3639

Our PDF patterns already have all sizes included in a single file, so they are multi-sized. Each size has a different sign and color.
Marfy Pdf digital patterns:
1. They are downloadable immediately and without shipping costs.
2. They are net, i.e. without seam allowances and hems.
3. They do not include step-by-step sewing instructions.
4. They are in five languages (Italian, English, French, Spanish, German) with all the necessary instructions, notches and letters to compose the pattern.
5. They are multi-sized: sizes are all included in one file.
